aboutUs.metaDescription: Our mission, vision and values. Connect with teachers and students and learn on your schedule.
aboutUs.title: About Free Time Classes

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: At Free Time Classes, we're dedicated to revolutionizing the way people learn and teach. Our platform connects passionate teachers with eager students, creating a vibrant community where knowledge flows freely and learning happens on your schedule.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We envision a world where quality education is accessible to everyone, everywhere. By breaking down traditional barriers to learning, we're creating opportunities for both students to grow and teachers to share their expertise in a flexible, modern way.

flexibility.title: Flexibility
flexibility.description: Learn and teach on your own schedule, from anywhere in the world.

community.title: Community
community.description: Join a supportive network of learners and educators passionate about sharing knowledge.

quality.title: Quality Education
quality.description: Access high-quality instruction from verified and experienced teachers.

joinUs.title: Join Our Community
joinUs.description: Whether you're here to learn or to teach, there's a place for you in our growing community.

teacherProfile.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this lesson?
teacherProfile.calendarGenerationHint: Recurring rules generate slots from today forward (12 weeks). If you just created a rule and cannot see it yet, move to upcoming weeks.

recurringAvailability.weeklyDescription: Set time windows that repeat every week. Bookable slots are generated for the next 12 weeks (existing slots are not duplicated).
recurringAvailability.weeklyGenerationNote: Important: when you save a rule, slots are created only for future dates (from today) within the 12-week horizon. Past weeks are not backfilled.
recurringAvailability.subject: Subject
recurringAvailability.blockTimesBothOrNone: Enter both start and end times, or leave both empty for a full-day block.
recurringAvailability.ruleSavedDetailed: Rule saved: {count} new slots generated between {start} and {end}.
recurringAvailability.ruleDeleted: Rule removed and its generated open slots cleared.
recurringAvailability.confirmDeleteRule: Delete this rule and the open slots it generated?
recurringAvailability.loadRulesError: Could not load rules (did you apply migration 004 in Supabase?).
recurringAvailability.exceptionsDescription: Block specific days or ranges (e.g. holidays) or add one-off slots outside your usual pattern.
recurringAvailability.blockSaved: Block applied; affected open slots were removed.
recurringAvailability.typeBlockedHelp: hides availability on the selected date/time range (if no times are set, the whole day is blocked).
recurringAvailability.typeExtraHelp: adds additional one-off slots on a specific date outside the recurring schedule.
recurringAvailability.confirmDeleteException: Delete this exception? (Slots removed by a block are not restored automatically.)

settingsPage.emailUpdateUnverified: We could not confirm the email change. Please try again in a few seconds.
settingsPage.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

settingsPage.passwordUpdateUnverified: We could not confirm the password change. Please try again.
settingsPage.deleteSectionDescription: If you delete your account, your profile and associated data will be removed.
settingsPage.deleteAccountConfirmDescription: This action will delete your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone. Do you want to continue?
settingsPage.pushNotificationsDescription: Push notifications require mobile integration (coming soon).
settingsPage.profileVisibilityDescription: Choose who can see your public profile.
settingsPage.exportDataDescription: Download a file with your personal data.
settingsPage.exportUnavailable: Export is generated on the server.
settingsPage.billingSupportDescription: Our team can help with charges, refunds, and payment receipts.
settingsPage.googleCalendarDescription: Connect your Google account to automatically create Google Meet events when you confirm bookings.
settingsPage.googleCalendarConnectedHint: Meet events will be automatically created when you confirm bookings.
settingsPage.googleCalendarAutoMeetHint: When you confirm a booking without a manual link, a Google Meet link will be automatically generated.

becomeTutor.title: Share Your Knowledge, Inspire Others
becomeTutor.subtitle: Join our community of tutors and start teaching what you love. Set your own schedule, set your own rates, and connect with students worldwide.
becomeTutor.step1Description: Sign up and build your tutor profile. Highlight your expertise, experience, and the subjects you teach.
becomeTutor.step2Description: Define your availability and set up recurring time slots. You're in full control of when you teach.
becomeTutor.step3Description: Students book your available slots, you confirm, and you're ready to teach. It's that simple.
becomeTutor.benefit1Description: Set your own hourly rates and get paid for every class you teach. No hidden fees.
becomeTutor.benefit2Description: Teach when it suits you. Morning, evening, weekends — you decide your availability.
becomeTutor.benefit3Description: Collect student reviews and ratings to grow your profile and attract more learners.
becomeTutor.benefit4Description: Our platform handles bookings, payments, and messaging so you can focus on teaching.
becomeTutor.ctaSubtext: Join hundreds of tutors already sharing their knowledge on our platform.
becomeTutor.loginRequired: You need an account to become a tutor
becomeTutor.upgradeDescription: Update your account settings to enable your tutor profile
becomeTutor.formProfessionalDescription: Tell us about your area of expertise.
becomeTutor.formRateHint: Tutors at your level typically charge between $80 and $140 for this subject.
becomeTutor.termsAccept: I accept the tutor terms of service and confirm I have the credentials required to teach.
